name: toggle-flip
title: Toggle Flip
description: An oversized UI toggle switch that flips with real physicality: thumb overshoot, track color crossfade, and a soft press-compress before release. The reference prop of the ui-props family.

variables.label: Flip direction
variables.description: Target end state the flip lands on.

variables.label: Caption
variables.description: Optional caption under the toggle. Blank hides the line.

variables.label: Size
variables.description: Toggle width as a percent of the host box width.
